transcript:
CALLER: Haan, yeh TPA ka matter hai. Meri company ka group mediclaim hai — United India Insurance. Aapke yahan cover hota hai?
AGENT: Ji haan, United India Insurance ke saath humara empanelment hai. Group mediclaim bhi acceptable hai generally. Aapki policy number hai kya?
CALLER: Haan, ek second... 0505012345678. Yeh hai.
AGENT: Theek hai. Aap kaunsa treatment ya department ke liye aa rahe hain?
CALLER: Surgery plan hai. Gallbladder ki. Doctor ne bola hai laparoscopic karna padega.
AGENT: Samajh gaya. Iske liye aapko pre-authorisation letter lena hoga apni insurance company se ya TPA se. Aap woh letter lekar aayein, hum apni end se process shuru kar denge. Insurance desk subah 9 baje se sham 5 baje tak hai.
CALLER: Okay. Aur koi documents aur chahiye?
AGENT: Haan — ID proof, original policy document, aur doctor ki prescription ya referral. Yeh sab lekar aaiye, aur koi problem nahi hogi.
CALLER: Bahut acha, shukriya.
